CREATE FUNCTION add_numbers(a bigint, b bigint) RETURNS bigint BEGIN RETURN a + b; END;
CREATE FUNCTION multiply_numbers(a int, b int) RETURNS int BEGIN RETURN a * b; END;
CREATE FUNCTION is_even(n int) RETURNS boolean BEGIN RETURN n % 2 = 0; END;
CREATE FUNCTION get_user_total_purchases(user_id int) RETURNS bigint BEGIN RETURN (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM purchases WHERE user_id = user_id); END;
CREATE FUNCTION calculate_discount(price decimal, discount_rate decimal) RETURNS decimal BEGIN RETURN price - (price * discount_rate / 100); END;
CREATE FUNCTION tiered_pricing(quantity int) RETURNS decimal BEGIN IF quantity < 10 THEN RETURN quantity * 10; ELSIF quantity < 20 THEN RETURN quantity * 9; ELSE RETURN quantity * 8; END IF; END;

CREATE FUNCTION get_top_selling_product(sales_threshold bigint) RETURNS TABLE(product_id int, total_sales bigint) BEGIN RETURN SELECT product_id, SUM(amount) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY product_id HAVING total_sales > sales_threshold; END;
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION concatenate_strings(str1 string, str2 string) RETURNS string BEGIN RETURN CONCAT(str1, str2); END;
CREATE FUNCTION calculate_age(birth_date date) RETURNS int BEGIN RETURN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM birth_date); END;
CREATE FUNCTION calculate_avg_order_value(user_id int) RETURNS decimal BEGIN RETURN (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders WHERE user_id = user_id); END;
CREATE FUNCTION get_most_frequent_item(user_id int) RETURNS int BEGIN RETURN (SELECT item_id FROM orders WHERE user_id = user_id GROUP BY item_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1); END;

CREATE FUNCTION custom_function(arg1 string, arg2 int) RETURNS string BEGIN DECLARE result string; SET result = CONCAT(arg1, ' '); IF arg2 > 0 THEN SET result = CONCAT(result, 'positive'); ELSE SET result = CONCAT(result, 'non-positive'); END IF; RETURN result; END;
